anomalies.t: NEW CRITICAL: Avenger 100% fail (3/3) — go.mod requires Go 1.26.3 but container has 1.24.13, plus golangci-lint missing. Agent burns 25 turns hunting tools then max_turns out. ~$3.13 wasted today.
NEW: 2 sandbox starts failed with `Container awf-squid is unhealthy → docker compose up exit 1`. Lockfile Stats + PR Sous Chef. Watch tomorrow.

Codex still failing. Error mutated from yesterday: now `Unknown parameter: stream_options.include_usage`. 4-day pattern under different error shapes — implies the underlying model/CLI mismatch is unresolved.
RECOVERED: Success rate 41.6%→81.1% after copilot CLI 1.0.48→1.0.52 upgrade removed both 05-23 criticals.
RESOLVED: 37 yday → 0 today. Copilot CLI upgrade.
RESOLVED: 17 yday → 0 today. Copilot CLI upgrade.

Block rate 4% today (140/3450) vs 15% yesterday (594/3933). Major improvement; de-escalated.
